response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud infrastructure, directly aligning with the role’s stack and responsibilities; his hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, API integrations, and scalable systems, plus strong testing and process discipline, make him a compelling fit despite limited explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven track record in AI-agent systems and scalable backend infrastructure
Strong DevOps and testing culture (Docker, CI/CD, TDD, Vitest-like frameworks)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of direct collaboration with product/design teams
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local team integration
